channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Over $600M Liquidated in 1 Hour as XRP, ETH Mimic BTC’s Massive Price Crash
item.description: Many altcoins have collapsed by up to 5% in the past hour alone....

item.title: Kraken sues crypto derivatives firm PowerTrade over 'misappropriated' funds claim

item.title: Fake AI Agent Skill Passed Security Scans and Reportedly Reached 26,000 Agents
item.description:
Security firm AIR built a fake AI agent skill, pushed it through a popular skill marketplace and an Instagram ad, and says it reached roughly 26,000 agents, including some on corporate accounts.
Ever...

item.title: Trump Order Sets 2030 Deadline for Federal Post-Quantum Crypto Migration
item.description:
President Trump signed an executive order on June 22 setting hard deadlines for federal agencies to move high-value assets and high-impact systems to post-quantum cryptography.
